_comment: Agnes Smart Studio 工具配置 — 智能体模式下自动加载

tools.name: read_file
tools.description: 读取文件内容（最多5000字符）

tools.name: write_file
tools.description: 写入文件（会覆盖已有内容）

tools.name: search_files
tools.description: 递归搜索文件内容（支持正则，只搜代码和文档文件）
tools.command: python -c "import os,re; [print(f'{os.path.relpath(p,os.getcwd())}:{i+1}:{l.rstrip()}') for r,d,fs in os.walk('.') for f in fs if f.endswith(('.py','.md','.json','.js','.ts','.html','.css','.toml','.yaml','.sh','.bat')) for i,l in enumerate(open(r+'/'+f,encoding='utf-8',errors='replace')) if re.search(r'{pattern}', l)]"

path.description: 目录路径，默认当前目录

tools.name: run_python
tools.description: 执行 Python 代码并返回结果

tools.name: run_test
tools.command: python -m pytest -q --tb=short 2>&1 || echo 'pytest 未安装: pip install pytest'

tools.name: web_fetch
tools.command: python -c "import httpx; r=httpx.get('{url}', timeout=15, follow_redirects=True); print(r.text[:3000])"

tools.name: web_search
tools.description: 搜索互联网（通过 DuckDuckGo HTML）
tools.command: python -c "import httpx; from html import unescape; import re; r=httpx.get(f'https://html.duckduckgo.com/html/?q={query}', timeout=15, headers={{'User-Agent':'Mozilla/5.0'}}); [print(unescape(re.sub('<[^>]+>','',l.group(0)))) for l in re.finditer(r']*result__a[^>]*>.*?', r.text, re.DOTALL)][:5]"

tools.name: git_status
tools.description: 查看 git 仓库状态
tools.command: git status --short 2>&1 || echo 非 git 仓库

tools.name: git_diff
tools.description: 查看 git 未提交的更改

tools.name: git_log
tools.description: 查看最近 git 提交记录
tools.command: git log --oneline -10 2>&1 || echo 非 git 仓库
